languages.text: "Анализ ситуации приводит к однозначным выводам. Зарков — мир повышенной опасности. Цикл нападений Погонщиц должен быть прерван. Позвольте возглавить исследования достопочтенному магосу Тау-Фу-0098 и обезопасить вашу колонию. Я, со своей стороны, предоставлю ему свою экспертизу в разработке технологических решений для выявленных им угроз".

traits.locale_text: [ДРАФТ] "Анализ ситуации приводит к однозначным выводам. Зарков — мир повышенной опасности. Цикл нападений Погонщиц должен быть прерван. Позвольте возглавить исследования достопочтенному магосу Тау-Фу-0098 и обезопасить вашу колонию. Я, со своей стороны, предоставлю ему свою экспертизу в разработке технологических решений для выявленных им угроз".

languages.text: "Analysis of the situation leads to unequivocal conclusions. Zarkov is a highly dangerous world. The cycle of Drover attacks must be broken. Allow the esteemed Magos Tau-Phi-0098 to lead the research efforts and secure your colony. In turn, I will lend him my expertise in developing technological solutions to the threats he identifies."

Allow the esteemed Magos Tau-Phi-0098 to lead the research efforts and secure your colony. In turn, I will lend him my expertise in developing technological solutions to the threats he identifies."

Allow the esteemed Magos Tau-Phi-0098 to lead the research efforts and secure your colony. In turn, I will lend him my expertise in developing technological solutions to the threats he identifies."

"Analysis of the situation leads to unequivocal conclusions. Zarkov is a highly dangerous world. The cycle of Drover attacks must be broken. Allow the esteemed Magos Tau-Phi-0098 to lead the research efforts and secure your colony. In turn, I will lend him my expertise in developing technological solutions to the threats he identifies."

languages.text: 「状況の分析は明確な結論を導き出す。ザルコフは非常に危険な世界である。ドルーバーの襲撃のサイクルを断ち切る。尊敬されるマゴス・タウ・フィ・0098に研究を任せてコロニーを確保する。その代わりに、彼が特定する脅威に対する技術的解決策の開発において、私の専門知識を提供する」
languages.original_text: "Analysis of the situation leads to unequivocal conclusions. Zarkov is a highly dangerous world. The cycle of Drover attacks must be broken. Allow the esteemed Magos Tau-Phi-0098 to lead the research efforts and secure your colony. In turn, I will lend him my expertise in developing technological solutions to the threats he identifies."

traits.locale_text: 「状況の分析は明確な結論を導き出す。ザルコフは非常に危険な世界である。ドルーバーの襲撃のサイクルを断ち切る。尊敬されるマゴス・タウ・フィ・0098に研究を任せてコロニーを確保する。その代わりに、彼が特定する脅威に対する技術的解決策の開発において、私の専門知識を提供する。」

languages.text: "Die Analyse der Situation führt zu eindeutigen Schlussfolgerungen. Zarkov ist eine höchst gefährliche Welt. Der Kreislauf der Drover-Angriffe muss durchbrochen werden. Erlauben Sie dem geschätzten Magos Tau-Phi-0098, die Forschungsarbeiten zu leiten und Ihre Kolonie zu sichern. Im Gegenzug werde ich ihm mein Fachwissen bei der Entwicklung technologischer Lösungen für die von ihm identifizierten Bedrohungen zur Verfügung stellen."
languages.original_text: "Analysis of the situation leads to unequivocal conclusions. Zarkov is a highly dangerous world. The cycle of Drover attacks must be broken. Allow the esteemed Magos Tau-Phi-0098 to lead the research efforts and secure your colony. In turn, I will lend him my expertise in developing technological solutions to the threats he identifies."

traits.locale_text: "Die Analyse der Situation führt zu eindeutigen Schlussfolgerungen. Zarkov ist eine höchst gefährliche Welt. Der Kreislauf der Drover-Angriffe muss durchbrochen werden. Erlauben Sie dem geschätzten Magos Tau-Phi-0098, die Forschungsarbeiten zu leiten und Ihre Kolonie zu sichern. Im Gegenzug werde ich ihm mein Fachwissen bei der Entwicklung technologischer Lösungen für die von ihm identifizierten Bedrohungen zur Verfügung stellen."

languages.text: "L'analyse de la situation conduit à des conclusions sans équivoque. Zarkov est un monde extrêmement dangereux. Le cycle des attaques de drover doit être brisé. Permettez à l'estimé Magos Tau-Phi-0098 de diriger les efforts de recherche et de sécuriser votre colonie. En retour, je lui apporterai mon expertise pour développer des solutions technologiques aux menaces qu'il a identifiées."
languages.original_text: "Analysis of the situation leads to unequivocal conclusions. Zarkov is a highly dangerous world. The cycle of Drover attacks must be broken. Allow the esteemed Magos Tau-Phi-0098 to lead the research efforts and secure your colony. In turn, I will lend him my expertise in developing technological solutions to the threats he identifies."

traits.locale_text: "L'analyse de la situation conduit à des conclusions sans équivoque. Zarkov est un monde extrêmement dangereux. Le cycle des attaques de drover doit être brisé. Permettez à l'estimé Magos Tau-Phi-0098 de diriger les efforts de recherche et de sécuriser votre colonie. En retour, je lui apporterai mon expertise pour développer des solutions technologiques aux menaces qu'il a identifiées."

languages.text: "El análisis de la situación lleva a conclusiones inequívocas. Zarkov es un mundo altamente peligroso. El ciclo de ataques Drover debe romperse. Permitan que el estimado Magos Tau-Phi-0098 dirija los esfuerzos de investigación y asegure su colonia. A cambio, le prestaré mi experiencia en el desarrollo de soluciones tecnológicas a las amenazas que identifique."
languages.original_text: "Analysis of the situation leads to unequivocal conclusions. Zarkov is a highly dangerous world. The cycle of Drover attacks must be broken. Allow the esteemed Magos Tau-Phi-0098 to lead the research efforts and secure your colony. In turn, I will lend him my expertise in developing technological solutions to the threats he identifies."

traits.locale_text: "El análisis de la situación lleva a conclusiones inequívocas. Zarkov es un mundo altamente peligroso. El ciclo de ataques Drover debe romperse. Permitan que el estimado Magos Tau-Phi-0098 dirija los esfuerzos de investigación y asegure su colonia. A cambio, le prestaré mi experiencia en el desarrollo de soluciones tecnológicas a las amenazas que identifique."

languages.text: "Durumun analizi kesin sonuçlara götürmektedir. Zarkov son derece tehlikeli bir dünya. Drover saldırıları döngüsü kırılmalıdır. Saygıdeğer Magos Tau-Phi-0098'in araştırma çabalarını yönetmesine ve koloninizi güvence altına almasına izin verin. Ben de onun belirlediği tehditlere karşı teknolojik çözümler geliştirme konusundaki uzmanlığımı ona sunacağım."
languages.original_text: "Analysis of the situation leads to unequivocal conclusions. Zarkov is a highly dangerous world. The cycle of Drover attacks must be broken. Allow the esteemed Magos Tau-Phi-0098 to lead the research efforts and secure your colony. In turn, I will lend him my expertise in developing technological solutions to the threats he identifies."
